Stale .git/index.lock detected ({0}). Th: Stale .git/index.lock detected ({0}). This usually means an earlier git command was interrupted. Removing it is safe IF no other git command is running right now.
Two silent retries failed. Likely causes:
Two silent retries failed. Likely causes:
  • Another git process is holding the index (terminal, IDE, or CI)
  • .git/index permissions or disk space
  • Antivirus / backup software locking the file

Inspect .git/ and try again from a clean state.

Abort stash pop? Conflict markers revert: Abort stash pop? Conflict markers revert; the stash entry stays.
Discard UU files and revert them to HEAD: Discard UU files and revert them to HEAD? In-progress resolution will be lost.
